Forge is treating this as a [api] based on your prompt. Generating plan...
Forge is treating this as a [react] based on your prompt. Generating plan...

<think>
I need to create a full-stack restaurant management application with 24 specific files.

Plan:
1. Initialize the project structure and create the 24 files.
2. Use `task_tracker` to manage the creation process.
3. Create files in batches to ensure efficiency and reliability.

Batch 1: Configuration and Schema (Files 1-4)
- package.json
- tsconfig.json
- next.config.js
- prisma/schema.prisma

Batch 2: Core App Structure (Files 5-7, 17, 18, 23, 24)
- src/app/layout.tsx
- src/app/page.tsx
- src/app/globals.css
- src/lib/prisma.ts
- src/lib/auth.ts
- src/middleware.ts
- .env.example

Batch 3: API Routes (Files 8-11)
- src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts
- src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts
- src/app/api/menu/route.ts
- src/app/api/orders/route.ts

Batch 4: Pages (Files 12-16)
- src/app/dashboard/page.tsx
- src/app/menu/page.tsx
- src/app/orders/page.tsx
- src/app/auth/login/page.tsx
- src/app/auth/register/page.tsx

Batch 5: Components (Files 19-22)
- src/components/Navbar.tsx
- src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx
- src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx
- src/components/OrderTable.tsx

I will start by initializing the task tracker.
</think>
